Box #7—Do It Beforehand!
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #4—Box #7 Do It Beforehand!
*What might you do beforehand that will benefit you later?
Think of all the things that impact your specific problem or opportunity you’re working with.
How might it help to change some of these things at an earlier time in the process?
*What might you do beforehand that will help you avoid problems or complications
down the road?
Think of all the things that could be contributing to the problem. Then, think of changes you
might make that could resolve it before the problem occurs.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
